titleStmt.title: SII 39.133: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 133. (A.R. No. 133 of 1916.) MĪÑJUR, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VARADARĀJAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. PARAKĒŚARIVARMAN ALIAS RĀJĒNDRA CHŌḺA DĒVA-4TH YEAR (1016 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of 1080 kuḻi of land for conducting festivals on the occasion of Aviṭṭam and Śripali-kalamuduvar in the temple of Chōḻakulasundara-Viṉṉagarāḻvār at Mīñjūr in Nāyaru nāḍu, a sub-division of Puḻarkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam by the Ūravar of the same place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kopparakesaripanmarāṉa śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu jayaṅ
koṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭattu nāyaṟu nāṭṭu miñcūr Ūrom Emmūr coḻakula
cuntaraviṇṇakar Āḷvārkkut tiṅkaṭoṟum Aviṭṭat tiruviḻāvukku veṇṭum cattukku nānūṟu
kuḻiyum Ittevarkkey nāṭoṟum śrīpalikku kāḷamūtuvariruvarkkuk kuḻi Ainnūṟṟaimpatu
māka nipantam vaitta nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai kāṭavaṭṭarkaḷiṟaippūmikku meṟkun teṉpārkkellai
kallaṭīśvaramuṭaiyār pūmikkum Ivvuṣṇu śrīpalipaṭṭikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai
ḻaḷi �lālavāya kuḻinūṟṟu muppatum Āka kuḻi
Digital edition of SII 39.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
